states.name: Alina
states.title: Elven Starcry
states.description: Alina studies thunder magic, but not to cast spells—she internalizes the power of air to enhance her martial abilities, slashing with thunder and blocking with gale force.

states.name: Alina
states.title: Elven Starcry
states.description: Alina has mastered thunder energy—when she moves, it's like a dance that cracks with energy. Her voice does not come from herself—it comes from the sky.
